summary: Updated all 6 existing Pulse reference documents and the build plan template to support Learning-Engaged Build Mode, and created 2 new templates. Additions include: Learning Landscape section in plan_template.md with friction recommendation, concept mapping, decision points, engagement tags, and suggested learning drops; Technical Concepts and Decision Points sections plus concepts_exercised deposit field in drop-brief-template.md; Question 6 about V's learning goals in interview-protocol.md (renamed to Six Questions); Area 7 Learning Annotations in filter-criteria.md with updated prompt template and concern areas; Learning Drop ready, Wave Review, and Decision Point escalation events plus Do Not Escalate entries in escalation-protocol.md; and a full Learning-Engaged Build Mode section in SKILL.md covering orchestrator responsibilities, rush mode override, and understanding bank integration. Created learning-drop-template.md for L-prefix pedagogical drops and decisions-template.md for DECISIONS.md build logs.
notes_for_orchestrator: All 8 files pass success criteria checks. The learning-drop-template.md uses nested markdown code fences which render correctly. The interview-protocol.md title was updated from 'Five Questions' to 'Six Questions' to reflect the addition. Filter criteria prompt template was updated to include area 7 in evaluation areas and concern area enum.
